name: User Authenticating via Multiple Explicit Credentials
notes: This rule detects a user attempting to authenticate with multiple target users using explicit credentials.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4648
when the event matches Initiator Username (custom) does not match any of expressions .*\$$
when the event matches Username is not N/A
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Initiator Username (custom) and different Username in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Initiator Username (custom) and different Username in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY User Authenticating via Multiple Explicit Credentials on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4648
AND when the event matches Initiator Username (custom) does not match any of expressions .*\$$
AND when the event matches Username is not N/A
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Initiator Username (custom) and different Username in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: User Authenticating via Multiple Explicit Credentials
Event description: Detects a user attempting to authenticate with multiple target users using explicit credentials.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
